purpose: Index every Phase 0 artifact and the raw machine evidence it depends on, so the search is auditable from a single entry point. Required by charter section 0.4.

phase0_artifacts.role: Machine-readable failure taxonomy for the Track A->K3 plus M/T/R arc (17 decision families + recurring failure mechanisms). Every row names the current governing primary metric and exact failure.
Content-addressed validation of all 17 taxonomy rows and all 41 cited evidence files.
Which exogenous-tape seed blocks are BURNED vs SEALED across all programs. Flags K2/K3 6800001+ collision and all-K3-burned-for-nothing.

Current local-vs-remote provenance after fetch and direct GitHub PR inspection: K3/a918 published on the origin Paper-2 branch; PR #2 and Program-I remain behind; 19 later commits through 2490248f local at refresh.
Thesis-native Op1-Op13 semantics, risk semantics, binding assumptions, canonical endpoint (ret_excel_visible_v1), Garrido-2024 and v0-draft claim boundaries. SHA-256 source hashes.
Fresh Excel-formula audit, canonical ReT lock, exact Garrido-2024 factory-index definition, repository mapping audit, prior CD-headroom evidence and metric/risk claim boundary.
Preserved row-level re-audit of all 20 CF sheets and 47,546 workbook formula rows; zero implementation mismatches under the current Excel/thesis ReT formula.
Corrected machine record: the Cobb-Douglas APP v1 runner failed audit and a later-discovered unauthorized execution burned seeds 9,600,001-9,600,400; its raw output is quarantined and non-evidence.
Raw quarantined output from the rejected, unauthorized v1 runner. Preserved only for provenance; no reported number is a valid H_PI, H_obs, ranking or null.
Chronology, exact seed burn, hard-coded reproduction flag, recovered-bytecode metadata and claim limits for the unauthorized APP/CD v1 execution.
Quarantined 16,463-byte recovered CPython 3.11 bytecode preserved solely to make the provenance incident auditable; not scientific source.
Replacement CD/APP protocol, blocked before preregistration pending faithful algorithms, valid ledgers, deployable observations and complete resource-matched comparators.
Mechanism-first literature review: 11 mechanism sections with equations, comparator obligations, and MFSC embeddability tests.
Fail-closed gate for thesis risk edits and realistic new risks: units, source/sign-off, observation timing, conservation, null cell, claim limit and anti-tuning rules.

Machine correction: current parallel recovery is an exact action-absence null, while a scarce Maintenance Battalion sequencing extension is domain-blocked rather than falsified because the historical invariance claim lacks a proof.

Machine correction of the Op7/R14 inspection facts and the frozen decision-right catalog's mechanism-completeness overclaim; records 12 declared exact-zero rows, distinguishes transition-live episode configuration from an absent sequential right, and gives scoped reversal screens/domain gates for inspection, component-specific R13/Op4 kit balancing and post-detection R14 disposition.
Machine chronology of every exact-proof and VPS-custody counterexample, remediation gate and current release prohibition.
Per-family canonical metric, named resources, proof class, ceiling scope and content-addressed evidence gate. All 17 rows are explicitly nonterminal for Return B.
Machine-readable 1-13 deliverable readiness matrix separating artifact existence from terminal scientific sufficiency.
Separate fail-closed Return-A/Return-B verifier result; neither route currently verifies.
